title: Trump says Iran will be bombed at a 'much higher level' if it doesn't agree to peace deal
summary_full: Stocks rose and oil prices plunged on news reports signaling the U.S. and Iran could soon strike an agreement to end the war.
summary_public: Stocks rose and oil prices plunged on news reports signaling the U.S. and Iran could soon strike an agreement to end the war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran will be bombed at a 'much higher level'
